economic_notes: First Nation has investments in Exchange Income Corporation, Wasaya Airways Limited Partnership, Wasaya Group Inc., Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership. Deposit of $1,000,000 toward purchase of L.K.G.H. Group of Companies sawmill (partially impaired). Youth sawmill program active. Solar project referenced. Whitefeather Forest Management Corporation is a consolidated subsidiary. Economic dependence on ISC funding noted.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) deferred revenue accounting departure from PS GAAP - had revenue not been deferred, total revenue would increase by $9,913,693, accumulated surplus by $42,454,535; (2) scope limitation on asset retirement obligation for landfill - PS 3280 not properly applied. Three consolidated subsidiaries: Pikangikum Health Authority, Pikangikum CMHC Housing Authority, Whitefeather Forest Management Corporation. Deferred revenue is very large at $63.4M relative to total revenue of $99M. OSR is effectively negative due to deferred revenue netting. Accumulated surplus per balance sheet is $86,271,397 but Note 16 shows $86,785,500 including remeasurement gains. Two new CMHC mortgages (Phase 5 and Phase 6) were added during the year totalling $2,211,920 in proceeds. Auditor firm name given only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants Inc.' from Winnipeg, Manitoba - no firm name provided.
